---
title: "Elimination Fraction Stuff"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


# Basic Pk

## Initial Concentration
```{r}

Dose<-50 
Vd<-.6
k<-5
t<-6


C0<-Dose/Vd #initial concentration = dose/volume of distribution


C1<-C0 * exp((-1)*k*t)

```

## Elimination Fraction


```{r}

t_half<-.5 #half life
tao<- 2 #dose interval
cheat<-(-0.693)

#fraction eliminated
fel<-1-(exp(cheat*(tao-t_half)))


```

#examples
```{r}
#t_half<-seq(0.25, 1, by = .1) #half life
t_half<-c(1, 10, 100) #half life

tao<- 2 #dose interval
cheat<-(-0.693)

#fraction eliminated
fel<-1-(exp(cheat*(tao-t_half)))

df<-tibble(t_half = t_half, 
           tao = tao, 
           cheat = cheat,
           fel = 1-(exp(cheat*(tao-t_half)))
)%>%
  mutate(fr = 1-fel)
```




```{r}
ggplot(df)+
  geom_point(aes(x = t_half, y= fel))+
  geom_point(aes(x = t_half, y= fr), color = 'red')+
  theme_bw()


```
